name: Pressure Washing Blueprint
summary: Reusable LOLA OS blueprint for exterior cleaning businesses focused on roof cleaning, house washing, paver sealing, pressure washing, commercial pressure washing, and commercial roof cleaning.

seo_architecture.service_area_strategy: Use useful local relevance by market and city. Avoid doorway-page spam and unverified ranking claims.

proof_standard.notes: Sandbar is the flagship proof client. Tampa Bay Power Clean validates separate-brand duplication, landing page deployment, SEO targeting, and shared temporary tracking.

open_assumptions: Dedicated Tampa Bay Power Clean CallRail number will improve attribution quality.
GBP admin access will improve local proof and tracking once available.
Blueprint should not be promoted to proven until validated across more clients or markets.
promotion_requirements: Validated across at least five businesses or markets
Revenue tracking connected for at least two clients
Clear evidence for primary service ranking and conversion patterns
